favBtn: div[class='container py-3 mb-10'] div:nth-child(1) span:nth-child(1) button:nth-child(1) svg
productPrice: body > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(5)
addToCartBtn: body > div:nth-child(4)  div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(5) > button:nth-child(2)
